title: Senior Teacher - Oliveboard - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Oliveboard - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Oliveboard invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oliveboard:
Oliveboard is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard!
